name: Gyoza (Pot Stickers)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound pork, turkey, beef or chicken, or 3/4 lbs., lean ground
med. shrimp finely chopped -- shelled, deveined
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all the filling ingredients well.
2. Place 1 rounded teaspoon of the mixture onto the center of each of about 30 Dynasty Gyoza wrappers.
3. Moisten the edge of the wrapper with water.
4. Fold the wrapper in half over the filling, pleating the edge as desired.
5. Press the edges to seal the gyoza.
6. Repeat with the remaining wrappers and filling.
7. Heat 1 tablespoon oil in each of two large non-stick pans.
8. Add the filled gyoza side-by-side in each pan.
9. Cook over medium-high heat for 1 to 2 minutes, or until lightly browned on the bottom.
10. Add 1/3 cup water to each pan, cover, and cook over medium heat for 3 to 4 minutes, or until the water is gone.
11. Serve the gyoza with soy sauce on the browned side up.
